exploration_notes: Identified the complete type narrowing architecture in checker.ts (lines ~27838-30222) and type definitions in types.ts. The entry point is getFlowTypeOfReference which walks the control flow graph via getTypeAtFlowNode, dispatching to narrowType for conditional narrowing. narrowType routes to ~15 specialized narrowing functions based on expression kind. Created security_review.md documenting 5 unsound patterns: (1) unchecked user-defined type guards, (2) discriminated union narrowing invalidate
